sprints.title: Core primitives, registry, CLI skeleton, and EvalLog
features: Pydantic-typed Task / Dataset / Sample / Solver / Scorer / Metric / EvalLog
Decorator registry for @task, @solver, @scorer, @metric, @tool
YAML-driven task composition
CLI skeleton: trine-eval run, score, list, view
Replayable binary+JSON log format
Scorer/metric separation enforced at type level
Trivial example task end-to-end through the primitives

sprints.title: Async execution, limits, sandboxing, and pytest/CI integration
features: Async runner with max_concurrency, token_limit, time_limit, cost_limit
Graceful limit-exceeded termination writing status to log
Docker-based sandbox for tool execution
Pytest plugin: eval tasks as pytest items with exit-code gating
CI-ready regression gate semantics

sprints.title: Anthropic SDK, Batch API, prompt caching, and judge protocol
features: Anthropic SDK provider with Batch API support
Prompt caching wired and surfaced in EvalLog
Opus 4.7 xhigh thinking tier and thinking-block pass-through with signature verification
Opus 4.7 1.0-1.35x tokenizer multiplier in token/cost accounting
model_roles (target/judge) with zero-code-change swap
Default LLM-as-judge protocol: rubric + golden + CoT -> {score, reason}
Binary-label judging with TPR/TNR reporting
Pairwise judging with position-swap debiasing

sprints.title: Agent trajectory eval end-to-end
features: End-state scoring as primary signal
Trajectory match modes: strict, unordered, subset, superset
Tool-call precision / recall / F1 and sequence-aligned Tool Call Accuracy
Per-trajectory step, unnecessary-call, and retry counts
Task Completion / Agent Goal Accuracy (reference-based and reference-free)
tau-2-bench adapter
Terminal-Bench 2.0 adapter
Shipped end-to-end trajectory eval runnable via CLI and pytest

sprints.title: RAG eval end-to-end
features: RAG triad scorers: Context Relevance, Faithfulness, Answer Relevance
RAGAS wrappers: Faithfulness, Response Relevancy, Context Precision, Context Recall, Factual Correctness
Top-k retrieval failure rate as standalone retrieval metric
Retrieval vs generation scoring separation (gold-chunk vs retrieved-chunk)
Citation / attribution accuracy scorer
Postgres + pgvector retrieval fixture
Shipped end-to-end RAG eval runnable via CLI and pytest

sprints.title: Code eval end-to-end
features: Test-execution-based scoring inside Docker sandbox
pass@k with Chen et al. unbiased estimator
FAIL_TO_PASS + PASS_TO_PASS regression gate
Cheap-tier pre-filter: lint -> type-check -> AST/semantic diff -> tests
SWE-bench Verified v2.0.3+ adapter
Terminal-Bench 2.0 adapter reused for code mode
EvalPlus (HumanEval+ or MBPP+) adapter
LiveCodeBench or SWE-bench Pro contamination-resistant adapter
Shipped end-to-end code eval runnable via CLI and pytest

sprints.title: P1 optimization: caching, secondary metrics, and P1 metrics
features: Output cache keyed on (prompt, model, params)
Trajectory-level LLM-as-judge with GraphTrajectory schema
Cost-per-task and steps-vs-optimal as first-class secondary metrics
RAG Noise Sensitivity metric
Long-context-vs-RAG A/B harness
Aider polyglot adapter
Cascade judges (Haiku first-pass -> Opus on disagreement)
pass@k sampling-count reduction heuristics
Prompt-compaction pass for cached prefixes
